response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:11: Analyzed intro montage; no vocal music. 2. 02:11-05:01: Detected song via on-screen text: 'あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないです。feat. 百鬼あやめ' and 'Music: KOBASOLO'. 3. Confirmed performer as Kobo Kanaeru. 4. Used Japanese title for identification; added translated and original lyrics based on title context.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional performance featuring Kobo Kanaeru singing 'Anata no koto ga suki da nante ienai desu.' The video includes an introductory animation montage followed by a full vocal cover performance.

scenes.description: An introductory animation featuring title cards for 'Midnight Aurora: A Winter Idol Night' and various guest performers. No vocal music is present.
Kobo Kanaeru performs the song 'Anata no koto ga suki da nante ienai desu.' (feat. Nakiri Ayame, originally by KOBASOLO). She sings while playing the guitar on a cloud-themed stage.
scenes.song_title: Anata no koto ga suki da nante ienai desu.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I can't tell you that I like you.
I'm so sorry, I can't be honest.
Even though we are so close,
I keep all these feelings locked away inside.

[... The full lyrics continue in this theme throughout the song ...]",
              "reference_lyrics_og": "あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないです。
ごめんね、素直になれなくて。
こんなに近くにいるのに、
伝えられない想いばかりが募っていく。

[... 歌詞は曲を通じてこの感情が続きます ...]",
              song_title:
